There are moments in your career that remind you growth rarely comes from doing what is familiar & yesterday was one of those moments when I had the privilege of serving as MC for Cyber First East Africa 2026 in Nairobi, guiding a full day of conversations t &nbsp;&nbsp; LinkedIn
